nodes.label: Persona System
nodes.rationale: Persona is assembled from real biographical/data sources and constrained by hard rules specifically to ground responses in fact and prevent hallucination, rather than being a generic chatbot.

nodes.label: System Prompt Hard Rules
nodes.rationale: Three hard rules (no hallucination, no jailbreak, no inappropriate content) are enforced in the system prompt to keep the twin faithful, safe, and on-topic since it represents a real person publicly.

nodes.label: Judge Model (Faithfulness Grading)
nodes.rationale: A separate, cheaper model (JUDGE_MODEL_ID, defaults to amazon.nova-lite-v1:0) is used for faithfulness judging because grading is a bounded structured-output classification task that doesn't need the answering model's reasoning power; decoupling also spares the answering model's Bedrock quota from judge traffic.
